hero.headline: Software, built end to end.
hero.lead: Web, mobile, AI features, infrastructure. I work with teams in the Netherlands and beyond, on whatever needs shipping.

services.title: Three things I help with.
services.lead: Software builds, AI features, infrastructure. Get in touch and we figure out the rest.

items.q: Do you work remote or on-site?
items.a: Both. Mostly remote, with visits to Amsterdam, Utrecht or Eindhoven when it helps the project.
Per project, after a short scoping call. No fixed packages, no surprise quotes. We agree the price up front.

items.q: Do you work with one client at a time?
items.a: No. I work with a few clients in parallel, usually a couple of days per week per engagement. That keeps me independent and focused.
We talk it through and adjust together. Most changes are minor and just shift the timeline a little.

items.q: What language do you work in?
items.a: English. Documentation, code, meetings, email. Standard for tech teams in the Netherlands.

cta.title: Ready to build something?
cta.lead: A 15-minute call is enough for both of us to know if there's a fit.

services.title: What I do
services.description: Software builds, AI features, and infrastructure work. Independent engineering for teams in the Netherlands and beyond.

hero.headline: What I do.
hero.lead: Three things I help with. If your need looks close to one of them, send a message and we figure out the rest together.

items.name: Software builds
items.summary: Web apps, mobile apps, back-end systems. I help you take an idea from sketch to a working product, or fill in for a team that needs an extra senior pair of hands.

items.name: AI in your product
items.summary: Computer vision, language models, OCR, or workflow agents. I help you add real AI features to a product, not slideware demos.

items.name: Infrastructure and DevOps
items.summary: Cloud setup, CI/CD, on-prem, or hybrid. I help you get your stack to run reliably without paying for a full ops team.

cta.title: Got something in mind?
cta.lead: Send a short message describing what you need. I reply within a day.

work.title: Selected work
work.description: Selected case studies. Computer-vision platform in Dutch agritech, and mobile and web product at a sportstech startup.

hero.headline: What I've built.
hero.lead: A few projects in detail. The challenge, how I tackled it, and what came out.

cases.client: AI computer-vision platform for Dutch agritech
cases.summary: Designed and operated an AI-driven system that classifies product images for industrial quality control. Sole engineer, end-to-end across application, ML, and infrastructure.
cases.approach: Hybrid architecture combining NVIDIA Triton for model serving with a modular NestJS API and a data pipeline using OCR and validation agents. Designed for production-scale throughput with cost and reliability in mind.

cases.client: Sportstech startup mobile and web product
cases.summary: Mobile and web engineer at an early-stage sportstech startup. Built React Native app with Unity game features plus React and Next.js back-office and public website end-to-end.
cases.approach: React Native app with embedded Unity game scenes. React and Next.js back-office and public website on a NestJS backend. AWS CI/CD, OAuth2 and Firebase Auth with RBAC across mobile and web.

cta.title: Similar engagement in mind?
cta.lead: Let's talk. I'll tell you in 15 minutes whether I can add value.

about.title: About Abdellah Jaize
about.description: Independent software engineer based in IJlst, Netherlands. Five years building production software, including AI features.
about.photoAlt: Abdellah Jaize, AI software engineer based in IJlst, Netherlands
bio: Hi, I'm Abdellah. A Moroccan engineer based in IJlst, Friesland. I've been building software professionally for five years, and lately a lot of that has been AI work that actually runs in production.

For the last two and a half years I've been the only engineer on a computer-vision platform at a Dutch agritech company. Backend, frontend, ML pipelines, infrastructure, all in production. Before that I built mobile and web product at an early-stage sportstech startup across React Native, Next.js, and AWS.

items.role: Software Engineer (AI computer-vision platform for a Dutch agritech company)
items.stack: AI computer-vision platform. NestJS, Vue, Triton, OCR.
React Native app with Unity, plus React/Next.js back-office and public website.

education.label: MASTER
education.value: M.Sc. Big Data & IoT · ENSAM Casablanca (2019 to 2021)

terms.title: Terms of engagement
terms.description: Terms of engagement for working with Jaize Tech, a sole proprietorship of Abdellah Jaize based in IJlst, Netherlands.
terms.headline: Terms
terms.intro: Short, clear terms for working with me. No fine print, no legal theatre. If something isn't clear, just ask.

sections.p: I'm Abdellah Jaize, software engineer trading as Jaize Tech (sole proprietorship). Based in IJlst, Friesland. KvK 42051769.

Software engineering, AI features, infrastructure work, and related technical services. We agree the scope of each engagement up front. What I'm not delivering goes in the proposal too, so there's no room for confusion.
Prices are fixed per engagement and agreed up front. No hidden costs. Invoicing happens per project or monthly for ongoing work. Payment terms are 14 days from invoice date unless we agree otherwise.
Something needs to change mid-engagement? No problem. We run a short change request with adjusted price and timeline. Both sides sign before the work shifts.
All code and deliverables I build for you belong to you once payment is complete. I may reference the work anonymously in my portfolio, unless we agree otherwise.
What you share with me stays between us. I'm happy to sign an NDA if you'd prefer. I expect the same from you for anything I show you during our conversations.

My liability is limited to the value of the specific engagement. I do my work as carefully as I can, but I don't guarantee outcomes from third parties like AI models, external APIs, or cloud providers.
If either of us wants to stop the engagement, put it in writing. Work already completed gets invoiced up to the cancellation date.
Dutch law applies to these terms. Disputes go to the competent court in Friesland.
Questions about these terms? Email me at abdellah@jaizetech.nl. I reply within 24 hours on business days.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: How Jaize Tech handles personal data from visitors and clients. A short, honest explanation. No tracking, no analytics.
privacy.headline: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Short explanation of what data I process and why. No pages of legal text. Just what you actually need to know.

sections.p: Abdellah Jaize, sole proprietorship Jaize Tech, based in IJlst, Netherlands. KvK 42051769. For questions about your data: abdellah@jaizetech.nl.
Only what you fill in on the contact form: name, email address, optionally company name, and your message. This site uses no tracking cookies and no analytics that personally identify you.
To read your message and reply. Nothing more, nothing less.
Until our conversation ends, then up to 2 more years for record-keeping. Want me to delete your data sooner? Send a mail and I'll do it within a week.
With Brevo for sending emails (they deliver my reply), and with Cloudflare for hosting this site. That's it. No advertising networks, no data brokers, no selling of data.

You have the right to access, correct, and delete your data. You can also object to processing. Email abdellah@jaizetech.nl and I'll handle it within a week. Not satisfied? You can complain to the Dutch Data Protection Authority (Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens).

Messages you send via the contact form go through an encrypted connection. I store your data in my email (Gmail with 2FA) and nowhere else. If there were ever a data breach, I'd report it within 72 hours per GDPR rules.
If I update this policy, the date at the top changes. Significant changes get announced on my site.
